mapper.sql: id, scriptname, threads, runtime, sample, samples,errors, error_1, errors_1, error_2, errors_2, error_3, errors_3, error_4, errors_4, error_5,errors_5 ,url, jplpath, indexpath, states
mapper.select: select id, runtime,scriptname,threads,url,sample, samples,errors, error_1, errors_1, error_2, errors_2, error_3, errors_3, error_4, errors_4, error_5,errors_5 from jmeter_interface_top5_errors where runtime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and scriptname = #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select * from jmeter_interface_top5_errors where runtime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and scriptname = #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into jmeter_interface_top5_errors (scriptname, threads, runtime, sample, samples, errors, error_1, errors_1, error_2, errors_2, error_3, errors_3, error_4, errors_4, error_5,errors_5 ,url, jplpath, indexpath, states) values (#{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sample,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{samples,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errors,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errors1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errors2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errors3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errors4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{errors5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jplpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{indexpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{states,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into jmeter_interface_top5_errors
id,
scriptname,
threads,
runtime,
sample,
samples,
errors,
error_1,
errors_1,
error_2,
errors_2,
error_3,
errors_3,
error_4,
errors_4,
error_5,
errors_5,
url,
jplpath,
indexpath,
states,

#{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{runtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sample,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update jmeter_interface_top5_errors
scriptname = #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
runtime = #{runtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample = #{sample,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
samples = #{samples,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
errors = #{errors,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_1 = #{error1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
errors_1 = #{errors1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_2 = #{error2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
errors_2 = #{errors2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_3 = #{error3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
errors_3 = #{errors3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_4 = #{error4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
errors_4 = #{errors4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_5 = #{error5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
errors_5 = #{errors5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jplpath = #{jplpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
indexpath = #{indexpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
states = #{states,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update jmeter_interface_top5_errors set scriptname = #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, runtime = #{runtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample = #{sample,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, samples = #{samples,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, errors = #{errors,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_1 = #{error1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, errors_1 = #{errors1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_2 = #{error2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, errors_2 = #{errors2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_3 = #{error3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, errors_3 = #{errors3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_4 = #{error4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, errors_4 = #{errors4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_5 = #{error5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, errors_5 = #{errors5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jplpath = #{jplpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, indexpath = #{indexpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, states = #{states,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
